title: taraxacum laticordatum
intro: Taraxacum laticordatum, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion or Eurasian dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum, with a broad, toothed leaf structure. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum laticordatum include its potential to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. This plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Taraxacum laticordatum is often prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture for its medicinal use.
